text:
On Wed, Sep 2, 2009 at 6:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis<edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/liblastfm,
>
> Please note that PR ports/138490 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/138490
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Patch is approved as submitted.
